strategy_code:
# CSD_RATIONALE_BEGIN
# This pipeline smoke test strategy performs unconstrained steps until the maximum number of steps is reached or the parser indicates that the generated sequence is complete.
# CSD_RATIONALE_END

# invariant lm.ValidTokensIdsLogits()
# invariant 0 <= stepsLeft <= maxSteps
# invariant len(generated) + stepsLeft <= maxSteps
# invariant helpers.ConstrainedWindowValid(generated)
# decreases stepsLeft
while stepsLeft > 0 and not parser.IsCompletePrefix(generated):
    next_token, new_steps = helpers.UnconstrainedStep(prompt, generated, stepsLeft)
    generated = generated + [next_token]
    stepsLeft = new_steps
tool_choice_rationale: This pipeline smoke test strategy performs unconstrained steps until the maximum number of steps is reached or the parser indicates that the generated sequence is complete.
